bannerDetail.badge: AIGC TO AGI Intelligent Era Leader
bannerDetail.heroDesc: AI Empowerment, Traffic Fission, Global Restructuring, Dawn Era! An AI innovation platform integrating agent development, super-individual incubation, enterprise transformation, and learning.
bannerDetail.overviewDesc: Leveraging full-stack AI technology to break information barriers, aggregate industry wisdom, and drive intelligent transformation across sectors.
bannerDetail.platformPositionDesc: Positioned as a one-stop AI innovation ecosystem hub, empowering AI practitioners, researchers, enterprises, governments and traditional industries.
bannerDetail.goal1Y: Launch all-domain integration platform APP, build industry recognition
bannerDetail.goal3Y: Become the largest C-end AI innovation platform in China
bannerDetail.goal10Y: Become an internationally influential AI innovation platform
bannerDetail.coreMissionDesc: Enable everyone to progress steadily from AIGC to AGI, master core AI skills, and achieve practical application in work and life.
bannerDetail.coreMissionSlogan: Cognitive Breakthrough · Skill Leap · Competitiveness Reshaping · Light Entrepreneurship Empowerment
bannerDetail.platformSlogan: Platform Purpose | AI Empowerment, Traffic Fission, Global Restructuring, Dawn Era!
bannerDetail.aiEmpowerDesc: AI as core driver, intelligent empowerment as core productivity for industry upgrade
bannerDetail.trafficFissionDesc: Exponential growth catalyzed by AI for explosive dissemination and conversion
bannerDetail.globalRestructureDesc: AI permeates all corners of society, systematically reshaping industry rules and business models
bannerDetail.dawnEraDesc: Ending the inefficiency of the old era, ushering in the AI-led intelligent economy
bannerDetail.functionDesc: Focus on AI full-chain needs, building an integrated service system from learning to industry empowerment
bannerDetail.solutionDesc: From informatization to intelligence, providing full-scenario, customized AI solutions for enterprises
bannerDetail.developmentDesc: Technology innovation as core, internationalization as direction, ecosystem as foundation
bannerDetail.valueDesc: Four core values building AI competitiveness for sustainable empowerment of individuals and enterprises
bannerDetail.fn1Desc: Precise recruitment + refined operations, dividing interest and skill sub-communities to build high-quality AI exchange communities.
bannerDetail.fn2Desc: Integrating global quality AI learning resources, offering expert live lectures, with credit reward mechanism to incentivize learning.
bannerDetail.fn3Desc: Regularly launching AI project practice and competitions, with expert judging panel scoring, providing resource support for outstanding projects.
bannerDetail.fn4Desc: Global technology intelligence collection, deep cooperation with universities/enterprises, promoting research achievement transformation and technology introduction.
bannerDetail.fn5Desc: Hyper-perception logical reasoning Agent, customized workflow development, achieving complex task decomposition and chain execution.
bannerDetail.fn6Desc: Exclusive RPA+AI technology, achieving full-platform automation programs, 24-hour monitoring, logically simulating manual operations.
bannerDetail.fn7Desc: Mcp protocol standardized integration, multi-Agent/complex workflow orchestration, breaking ecosystem fragmentation.
bannerDetail.fn8Desc: Connecting upstream and downstream AI industry chains, holding industry summits/matching meetings, enhancing overall industry competitiveness.
bannerDetail.fn9Desc: MCN institutionalized incubation of AI super individuals, hand-by-hand building personal IP, achieving intelligent entrepreneurship.
bannerDetail.sol1Desc: Full-link strategy support from awareness to repurchase, covering advertising creativity, lead evaluation, content marketing, repurchase analysis and other core links.
bannerDetail.sol1Item2: Precise demand analysis and member management
bannerDetail.sol1Item4: Repurchase strategy generation and customer mining
bannerDetail.sol2Desc: 7*24 hours automated customer service, full-channel access, intelligent Q&A library + real-time script support, achieving lead retention and rule optimization.
bannerDetail.sol2Item2: Manual customer service real-time script support
bannerDetail.sol3Desc: Goal-oriented automated office, covering document drafting, form filling, document review, process management and other basic office links.
bannerDetail.sol3Item3: Intelligent document comparison and error correction
bannerDetail.sol4Desc: Building enterprise privatized 'think tank', achieving automatic knowledge classification, intelligent retrieval, data insight and report generation.
bannerDetail.sol4Item3: Intelligent data query and analysis reports
bannerDetail.sol4Item4: Knowledge asset accumulation and version management
bannerDetail.sol5Desc: Full-process AI empowerment from recruitment to training, achieving flexible employment, intelligent matching, sales/customer service AI training.
bannerDetail.sol5Item1: Flexible employment and intelligent talent matching
bannerDetail.sol5Item2: Sales/customer service AI training and script training
bannerDetail.sol6Desc: Accelerating product launch full process, from feasibility analysis, design assistance to quality evaluation, service improvement full-link empowerment.
bannerDetail.sol6Item1: Market demand mining and feasibility analysis
bannerDetail.sol6Item2: Product design assistance and drawing generation
bannerDetail.sol6Item3: Packaging design and industrial styling verification
bannerDetail.sol6Item4: Quality real-time evaluation and service improvement
bannerDetail.dev1Item1: Exploring emerging basic theory fields such as quantum computing and AI, neuro-symbolic computing, providing new theoretical support.
bannerDetail.dev1Item2: Promoting deep integration of AI with IoT, big data, blockchain and other technologies, expanding multi-domain application scenarios.
bannerDetail.dev1Item3: Focusing on smart cities, smart agriculture, smart energy and other fields, achieving large-scale implementation of AI technology.
bannerDetail.dev2Item1: Strengthening exchanges and cooperation with international AI organizations, research institutions, and enterprises, holding international AI conferences/competitions.
bannerDetail.dev2Item2: Promoting Chinese AI technology and solutions to the world, contributing Chinese wisdom to global AI development.
bannerDetail.dev2Item3: Setting up branches/cooperation bases overseas, connecting with local markets, providing customized AI technology consulting services.
bannerDetail.dev3Item1: Strengthening cooperation with upstream and downstream industry chain enterprises, forming close and efficient industry alliances, achieving resource sharing.
bannerDetail.dev3Item2: Jointly with industry associations/enterprises to formulate AI technology standards, guiding healthy and orderly industry development.
bannerDetail.dev3Item3: Establishing AI ethics committee, focusing on social responsibility and ethical norms, letting AI develop under the rule of law framework.
bannerDetail.val1Desc: Gathering global AI professionals, forming high-level talent exchange networks, providing quality talent resource pools for enterprises, promoting precise matching of talent and industry.
bannerDetail.val2Desc: Real-time aggregation of global frontier AI technology, stimulating innovation through practical competitions and project incubation, promoting rapid transformation of research achievements.
bannerDetail.val3Desc: Deeply mining industry needs and pain points, providing customized AI solutions, helping enterprises improve production efficiency, reduce costs, and promoting collaborative development of industry chains.
bannerDetail.val4Desc: Integrating learning, technology, projects, capital and other resources, achieving optimal allocation, members collaborating to overcome technical difficulties, accelerating AI popularization.
